statement: In every magma, Equation 1947 (`x = (y * (y * z)) * (y * z)`) implies Equation 1306 (`x = y * (((x * z) * z) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0170
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y z)) (op y z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x z) z) w))
